parsed.availability_comment: Named in MI squad and no fresh adverse report located before season start.
parsed.availability_note: No current injury/unavailability found; expected available for full league phase.
parsed.followup_reason: MI messaging says de Kock adds top-order flexibility, but retained Rickelton creates unresolved keeper-opener pecking order for opening games.

parsed.playing_xi_comment: Auction buy for top-order depth; direct overlap with retained Ryan Rickelton keeps him non-locked.
